---
title: "Collection of Datasets"
output: html_document
---

*** 
### Overview
I initially developed this collection as part of my Introduction to Applied Statistics Class. A collection of datasets available in R can be found on [that page](smasongarrison.github.io/Class.html).

*** 

### Data Collections

```{r message=FALSE,echo=FALSE,warning=FALSE}
if (!require("DT")) install.packages('DT')
d<-read.csv("data.csv", header=FALSE, stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
m = matrix(as.matrix(d), ncol=2)
colnames(m) = c('<span>Name</span>', 'Notes')
datatable(m, escape = FALSE)
```

### Datasets in R
```{r message=FALSE,echo=FALSE}
if (!require("DT")) install.packages('DT')
d<-read.csv("datasets.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
m = matrix(as.matrix(d),ncol=5)
colnames(m) = c('<span>Package</span>', 'Item','Title', 'csv','doc')
datatable(m, escape = FALSE)
```
